drill_groups.name: Treadmill Sprints
drill_groups.description: High-intensity treadmill running to improve speed and endurance.

workouts.name: 30-Second Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Set treadmill to speed 3.0 and sprint for 30 seconds; focus on quick turnover.

workouts.name: 1-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Run at speed 3.5 for one minute; maintain posture and steady breathing.

workouts.name: 3-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Sprint for three minutes at speed 4.0; use light incline if available.

workouts.name: 5-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Hold speed 5.0 for five minutes; focus on even pacing and mid-foot strike.

workouts.name: 6-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Sustain speed 5.2 for six minutes; relax shoulders and drive knees.

workouts.name: 8-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Hold speed 5.5 for eight minutes; keep cadence consistent.

workouts.name: 10-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Run at speed 5.8 for ten minutes; control breathing every few strides.

workouts.name: 11-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Maintain speed 6.0 for eleven minutes; keep stride light.

workouts.name: 13-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Hold speed 6.2 for thirteen minutes; check arm swing stays compact.

workouts.name: 15-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Run at speed 6.5 for fifteen minutes; steady breath every three steps.

workouts.name: 16-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Maintain speed 6.9 for sixteen minutes; relax grip on handrails.

workouts.name: 18-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Stay at speed 7.3 for eighteen minutes; keep hips level.

workouts.name: 20-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Run twenty minutes at speed 7.6; focus on steady cadence.

workouts.name: 21-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Hold speed 7.9 for twenty-one minutes; monitor breathing rhythm.

workouts.name: 22-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Run at speed 8.2 for twenty-two minutes; maintain tall posture.

workouts.name: 23-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Keep speed 8.0 for twenty-three minutes; focus on smooth stride.

workouts.name: 25-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Maintain speed 8.1 for twenty-five minutes; settle into relaxed rhythm.

workouts.name: 26-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Run twenty-six minutes at speed 8.3; keep strides short and quick.

workouts.name: 28-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Stay at speed 8.5 for twenty-eight minutes; check breathing every minute.

workouts.name: 30-Minute Treadmill Sprints
workouts.description: Hold speed 8.7 for thirty minutes; stay relaxed through shoulders.
